query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS discount_codes (
  id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
  code VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  description VARCHAR(255),
  discount_type ENUM('percentage', 'fixed_amount', 'free_delivery') NOT NULL,
  discount_value DECIMAL(10, 2) DEFAULT 0,
  min_order_value DECIMAL(10, 2) DEFAULT 0,
  max_discount_amount DECIMAL(10, 2),
  store_id INT,
  max_uses_total INT,
  max_uses_per_customer INT DEFAULT 1,
  current_uses_total INT DEFAULT 0,
  starts_at TIMESTAMP NULL,
  expires_at TIMESTAMP NULL,
  is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX dc_code_idx (code),
  INDEX dc_active_idx (is_active)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS discount_usage (
  id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
  discount_code_id INT NOT NULL,
  customer_id INT NOT NULL,
  order_id INT,
  discount_amount DECIMAL(10, 2) NOT NULL,
  used_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX du_code_id_idx (discount_code_id),
  INDEX du_customer_id_idx (customer_id)
);

  is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,

  updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
